sql_array: UPDATE test_datetime SET event_time = addMilliseconds(event_time, 5000) WHERE event_time = toDateTime('2024-01-01 00:00:00');
SELECT addMilliseconds(event_time, 10000) AS updated_time FROM test_datetime;
SELECT addMilliseconds(toString(event_time), 2000) AS updated_time_string FROM test_datetime;
